Weekend Low Liquidity Window (No Scheduled Macro Releases)

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$78,350 on May 3 consolidating below $80K resistance. Up ~11.87% in April (best monthly 2026). Fear & Greed Index: 39 (Fear zone, down from 70 last week). 24h range: $78,095-$79,005. BTC dominance: 58.5%. Market cap: ~$2.68T.
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 39 (Fear) — significant bearish sentiment shift vs 70 (Greed) last week
FOMC April 29: held 3.5-3.75% with rare 8-4 dissent split — hawkish signals 'higher-for-longer', weighing on crypto
$80K strong resistance zone — long-term holders reducing positions at psychological level
April BTC spot ETF monthly: $2.44B — strongest institutional demand since Oct 2025 (bullish)
May 1 single-day ETF: $629.8M net (BlackRock IBIT $284.4M, Fidelity FBTC $213.4M)
SEC raised IBIT option position limit to 1M contracts on May 1 — institutional infrastructure expansion
ARK Invest: BTC market cap $16T by 2030 — long-term bullish institutional narrative
Technical support at $76,200 (23.6% Fibonacci retracement) — buyers defending level
No major macro data releases in next 24h (PPI May 13, next FOMC June 16-17)
Iran peace proposal submitted May 1 — mild risk-on backdrop, crude oil declining
analysis.macro_backdrop: Weekend May 3-4: no scheduled macro releases. FOMC held 3.5-3.75% on Apr 29 — 8-4 dissent split is hawkish signal, 'higher-for-longer' language weighing on speculative assets. Fed Chair Powell exits May 15; Kevin Warsh transition adds uncertainty. CPI ~3.3% YoY (elevated). Next key macro: ISM Services May 5, NFP Apr data May 8, PPI May 13, CPI ~May 12.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.55): BTC is consolidating after April's +11.87% rally, facing strong $80K resistance with LTH profit-taking. Fear & Greed at 39 (Fear) indicates sentiment deterioration from peak. FOMC hawkish hold with rare 8-4 dissent signals 'higher-for-longer' monetary policy, historically bearish for crypto. Bullish counterweights: record ETF inflows, strong institutional demand, and intact technical structure above $76K support. Net signal: sideways/neutral — momentum exhaustion at resistance with no clear catalyst to break above or below in next 24h.
